title: iit-DLSLab/fault-locomotion-isaaclab
abstract:
An IsaacLab DirectEnv for quadrupedal locomotion under motor failures, with support for multiple quadruped robots, sim-to-sim, and sim-to-real pipelines

# fault-locomotion-isaaclab An IsaacLab DirectEnv for quadrupedal locomotion under motor failures, with support for multiple quadruped robots, sim-to-sim, and sim-to-real pipelines. Features: - [Concurrent State Estimator](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2202.05481) - [Rapid Motor Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2107.04034) - [Mixture-of-Experts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.25965) - Sim-to-Sim in [Mujoco](https://github.com/google-deepmind/mujoco) - Sim-to-Real in ROS2 Real-world deployment via: - [muse](https://github.com/iit-DLSLab/muse/tree/unitree_sdk) for state estimation (if no concurrent state estimation is used) - [unitree-ros2-dls](https://github.com/iit-DLSLab/unitree-ros2-dls) for unitree robot communication A list of robots and environments available are described below: | Robot Model | Environment Name Pattern | |---------------------|------------------------------------------------------------| | [Aliengo](https://github.com/iit-DLSLab/gym-quadruped/tree/master/gym_quadruped/robot_model/aliengo), [Go2](https://github.com/iit-DLSLab/gym-quadruped/tree/master/gym_quadruped/robot_model/go2) | FaultLocomotion-**RobotModel**-Flat-Blind FaultLocomotion-**RobotModel**-Rough-Blind FaultLocomotion-**RobotModel**-Rough-Vision | ## Installation and Runs If you want only to deploy a trained policy on your robot, continue on [README_DEPLOY](./README_DEPLOY.md) otherwise on [README_TRAIN](./README_TRAIN.md). **For the train, check first the compatibility with IsaacLab and rsl-rl at the top of this readme. They indicate the releases that we tested.** ## Citing this work If you find the work useful, please consider citing one of our works: #### [Mixture-of-Experts RL for Fault-Tolerant Legged Locomotion (ArXiv)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.25965) ## Maintainer This repository is maintained by [Giulio Turrisi](https://github.com/giulioturrisi)
abstract_zh: 一个基于IsaacLab的DirectEnv，用于电机故障下的四足机器人运动，支持多种四足机器人、sim-to-sim和sim-to-real流水线。特性包括：并发状态估计器、快速运动适应、混合专家模型、在Mujoco中的sim-to-sim、通过ROS2的sim-to-real部署。真实世界部署可通过muse（用于状态估计）和unitree-ros2-dls（用于宇树机器人通信）实现。支持的机器人模型和环境模式见下表。
tldr_zh: 一个支持电机故障下四足运动的IsaacLab环境，具备sim-to-real能力。
cover_zh: 电机故障也不怕｜四足机器人的新训练环境来了

judge.reason: 四足机器人故障下运动控制的仿真环境，支持sim2real，有实用价值。
